features.notes: package.ts registers info + previewGenomeBrowse (fileViewer for json) and constructs the view; genome-file-browse-viewer-wrapper.tsx renders the JBrowse linear genome view via React. No feature-specific tests in package-test.ts (only generic test harness).

autostartChecker and checkGenomeConfig live in detectors.js (not in files.src), so only package.ts is emitted because it wires the fileViewerCheck reference (meta.fileViewerCheck: GenomeBrowser:checkGenomeConfig).
